text: What if your heartbeat is telling you more than you think? An ECG, or electrocardiogram, captures the electrical activity of your heart. But why is this important? Your heart's rhythm can reveal hidden issues. For instance, irregularities can indicate arrhythmias or even heart attacks. Understanding ECGs empowers you to take charge of your health. Curious about your heart’s health? Explore ECGs further and stay informed!
